question: Tell me about Saket Gupta.
answer: Saket Gupta is a Computer Engineering undergraduate based in Ahmedabad, India. He has hands‑on experience building production‑grade AI systems and full‑stack web products. His technical skills include working with large language model (LLM) prompt pipelines, retrieval‑augmented generation (RAG), and local model workflows, as well as delivering end‑to‑end applications using React and Next.js. He can be reached at +91 9714042629, via email at saketgupta2707@gmail.com, and has LinkedIn and GitHub profiles.
